Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Johan Kugelberg punk collection, circa 1974-1986.
Collection Number: 8060

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Johan Kugelberg punk collection, circa 1974-1986.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
8060
Abstract:
Collection of approximately 3,000 rare and unique items documenting English and American punk and post-punk music, circa 1974-1986.
Creator:
Kugelberg, Johan
Quanitities:
25 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Collection of approximately 3,000 rare and unique items documenting English and American punk and post-punk music, circa 1974-1986. The collection includes original manuscripts, approximately 365 fliers and posters, approximately 1,300 fanzines, sound recordings, clothing, photographs, original art, and other ephemera. 157 books in the collection are cataloged separately.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Johan Kugelberg punk collection, #8060. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Boxes 13, 16, 24, 27, and 28 closed for digitization project.
SUBJECTS

Subjects:
Punk rock music -- England.
Punk rock music -- United States.
Form and Genre Terms:
Works of art.
Sound recordings.
Clothing.
Fanzines.
Posters.
Fliers (printed matter).
